case_title: MIRALOMA CLEANERS VS LAUNDRY& DRY CLEANING EQUIPMENT CO-LAI,DAVID -PRES

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAUNDRY& DRY CLEANING EQUIPMENT CO-LAI,DAVID -PRES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MIRALOMA CLEANERS AS TO DEFENDANT LAUNDRY& DRY CLEANING EQUIPMENT CO-LAI,DAVID -PRES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRALOMA CLEANERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAUNDRY& DRY CLEANING EQUIPMENT CO-LAI,DAVID -PRES $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LAUNDRY& DRY CLEANING EQUIPMENT CO-LAI,DAVID -PRES HEARING SET FOR DEC-02-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAUNDRY& DRY CLEANING EQUIPMENT CO-LAI,DAVID -PRES
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-02-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-03-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-27-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
